graphlib/TopologicalSorter.name: TopologicalSorter
graphlib/TopologicalSorter.description: Provides functionality to topologically sort a graph of hashable nodes. A topological order is a linear ordering of the vertices in a graph such that for every directed edge u -> v from vertex u to vertex v, vertex u comes before vertex v in the ordering. For instance, the vertices of the graph may represent tasks to be performed, and the edges may represent constraints that one task must be performed before another; in this example, a topological ordering is just a valid sequence for the tas...
